message:
test(escalate): add unit tests for escalation command logic (gt-o9l1h)

Add escalate_test.go with 10 test functions covering the pure functions
in escalate_impl.go: getNextSeverity, extractMailTargetsFromActions,
severityEmoji, formatRelativeTime, formatEscalationMailBody,
formatReescalationMailBody, detectSenderFallback, executeExternalActions,
runEscalate validation paths, and a cross-check against config.NextSeverity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
